name: RF Industries, Ltd.
description: RF Industries, Ltd. designs and manufactures a broad range of interconnect products across diversified, growing markets including wireless/wireline telecom, data communications, and industrial sectors. The company's extensive product portfolio includes RF connectors, coaxial cables, data cables, wire harnesses, fiber optic cables, custom cabling, energy-efficient cooling systems, and integrated small cell enclosures. Headquartered in San Diego, California, RF Industries provides high-quality connectivity and thermal management solutions that support critical infrastructure, including distributed antenna systems, public safety networks, aerospace, defense, and transportation applications, helping to connect today’s networks with the technology of tomorrow.
